title: The procedure of the social audit of the local government activity
author: Zertchaninova, T.E.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article discusses the social audit methodology, witch include social diagnostics, evaluation and projection. This paper uses a survey of citizens to analyze social efficiency of local government activities.
steps_raw: This article discusses the social audit methodology, witch include social diagnostics, evaluation and projection. This paper uses a survey of citizens to analyze social efficiency of local government activities.
